title: draba bhutanica
intro: Draba bhutanica, a species of flowering plant in the genus Draba, is a type of mustard plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Draba bhutanica is often used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, and is also used in traditional remedies like tonics and powders, although its preparation and dosage should be guided by a healthcare professional.
